evals.expected_output: Runs the full doc-sync sequence (pre-flight provenance check, --update stamp, doc-count check, post-stamp provenance check, implementation-status reminder, markdown lint) and outputs a structured summary report.

evals.prompt: I just finished implementing the core/security submodule and the PR is about to go up. Can you stamp provenance and make sure all the doc counts are right before I open it?
evals.expected_output: Runs all syncing-docs steps in order, notes the security submodule context for the implementation-status check, stamps sidecars, verifies counts, and reports each step outcome.

evals.prompt: reconcile docs — we merged two PRs today and I want to make sure the provenance metadata isn't stale
evals.expected_output: Identifies this as a syncing-docs task, runs the full sequence starting with pre-flight verification before stamping, and produces the summary report.
